T2-0083
T2-0084
T2-0086
T2-0087
T2-0186
T2-0187

If you need a macOS build, you (or someone with a Mac) would need to:

Clone the repo on the Mac
Install Python 3.13 and create a venv
pip install -r requirements.txt pyinstaller
Run: python -m PyInstaller --onefile --windowed --name "DeviceDataViewer" --hidden-import=babel.numbers --hidden-import=mysql.connector.plugins.mysql_native_password --hidden-import=mysql.connector.plugins.caching_sha2_password main.py

DB_CONFIG = {
    "host": "34.72.78.51",
    "port": 3306,
    "user": "aaireader",
    "password": "3MgGJPqWdYCAxbonyn8O5F9lMCqQ0V9e",
    "database": "oncall",
    "use_pure": True,
}
